purpose: Represent whether a Studio capability is actually working, partial, broken, manual-only, costly, or approval-gated.

required_fields.last_probe: Last probe object or null when unprobed.
required_fields.fallback: Fallback path if this capability is unavailable.
required_fields.proof_reference: Artifact proving current status or null.

optional_fields.required_for: Features or recipes that require this capability.

blocks: features that require a broken or missing capability

proof_validation_expectations: Declared configuration is not enough; working status requires a probe or proof reference.
$50+ projected cost must set approval_requirement to fritz_required.
Missing capability blocks only work that requires it.
last_error is present when status is broken or partial due to failure.
